> llms.txt — Machine-readable documentation index

## Project Summary

- Architecture: Monolithic application, likely a simple backend service. Given the presence of `src/index.ts`, `src/lib/auth.ts`, and `src/lib/websocket.ts`, it's plausible this is a single process handling authentication and potentially real-time communication.
- Language: TypeScript
- Type: web, library
- Files: 12 | Functions: 52 | Classes: 0
- Stack: Main Dependencies: @elysiajs/cors, @supabase/supabase-js, elysia, redis, zod, Dev Dependencies: @types/bun, Scripts: dev, start
